title: Timeline
scope: Family journal + microblog of posts, photos, and tags. Doubles as the platform's automatic activity log — whenever any app fires digest_record on a non-read CRUD, a personal post is written here, so every action is also a journal entry. NOT a per-app history view; Timeline is the unified family feed.

specs.title: Create a post
specs.behavior: Posting creates a new Timeline entry (family journal / microblog) with title, body, and tags.

specs.title: Browse the feed
specs.behavior: Browsing returns the Timeline feed, paginated, newest first.

specs.title: Get a post
specs.behavior: Getting returns a single post with its full content and photos.

specs.title: Edit a post
specs.behavior: Editing changes a post's title, body, or tags.

specs.title: Delete a post
specs.behavior: Deleting removes a post and its linked document.

specs.title: Search the timeline
specs.behavior: Searching does full-text matching across post titles and bodies.

specs.title: Pin a post
specs.behavior: Pinning toggles a post's pinned status so it sticks to the top of the feed.

specs.title: Attach photos
specs.behavior: Attaching adds photos to a post for its carousel.

specs.title: List tags
specs.behavior: Listing returns all Timeline tags with their post counts.
